steps.title: Identify backsolve trigger
steps.content: The answer choices are simple integers, so we can use the backsolving shortcut. Start with the middle alphabetical choice, which is B.

steps.title: Test Choice B — 32
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing Choice B — 32 (32):
$$t = 1000 + 18 \times 32 = 1000 + 576 = 1576$$
This equals the given total pay of $1576, so Choice B — 32 satisfies the equation.
That matches Choice B — 32.
